Workshop Session 1
(Sections 1-5)
Establishing The Gap
MODULE 3
Workbook & Example Pack
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 22 --

-1-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
What You’re Coaching:
Immediate Self-Selection (oh..hey… that’s me)
Exclusive Empowerment (something that entitles them to read on)
A feeling of “synchronicity” (wow… perfect timing)
How to Write It:
General Format:
Important question for (instant identifier) who still haven’t (overcome big-
gest problem or achieved most desirable outcome)
Version 1 - The Implied Injustice
Important Question for [instant identifier] who still haven’t [achieved big
promise]
Version 2 - The Implied Injustice Pt. 2:
Important Question for [instant identifier] who’ve [big accomplishment] but
still haven’t been able to [big promise]
Version 3 - The Struggle is Real:
Important question for [instant identifier] who are experiencing [short ver-
sion of MOHT]
Version 4 - Keeping The Dream Alive:
Important question for [instant identifier] who are actively trying to [achieve
big promise]
Version 5 - The Graduate:
Important Question for [instant identifier] who’ve already [big accomplish-
ment] and want to [achieve big promise] by [specific timeframe]
Section 1 - The Pre-Headline Qualifierwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 22 --

-2-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
1. List Builder’s Lab 2.0 by Amy Porterfield (Version 1)
Important question for coaches, experts & course creators who STILL don’t
have a profitable email list of over 2,500 engaged, ready-to-buy subscribers:
2. Yoga Training: (Version 2)
Career-defining question for yoga professionals who despite completing
over 500 hours of teacher training, still don’t have a sustainable business
3. Breastfeeding Consultant (Version 3)
Important question for first time, breastfeeding moms worried that their
newborn isn’t getting enough milk.
4. Leadership Training/Consulting (Version 4)
Critical “make or break” question for ambitious, impact-driven female execu-
tives, leaders, and founders committed to scaling beyond 1M+ Revenue in
2018
5. Golf Coach/Training (Version 5)
Season-defining question for 15-handicap golfers looking to break 80 for the
first time this spring…
Write Your Pre-Headline Qualifier:
Examples: www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 22 --

-3-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
What You’re Coaching:
Curiosity
Resourcefulness
Implied Promise
Awareness of the gap
How to Write It:
Version 1: The If/Without/Would
If there was a way to [achieve big promise] without [process related pain
points]... would you finally feel confident committing to [achieving X]
Version 2: The Difference Maker
What’s the ONLY/BIGGEST difference between people who achieve [big
promise] and those who [experience MOHT]
Section 2 - The Question Loop Headline:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 22 --

-4-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
1. List Builder’s Lab 2.0 by Amy Porterfield (Version 1)
If there was a predictable, step-by-step method for attracting a steady surge
of perfectly-targeted leads EVERY SINGLE DAY without the confusion, tech
overwhelm, or crippling “what the heck do I do next” syndrome….
Would you finally feel confident enough to make profitable list building your
business’s #1 priority?
2. 10x Launches by Ry Schwartz (Version 2)
What’s the biggest difference between a game-changing product launch...
and one that barely covers your Infusionsoft bill?
3. Funnels That Scale by Greg Hickman (Version 2)
What’s the ONLY difference between a powerful, automated sales funnel
that allows you to confidently scale up to 450K+/year…
… and one that you ugly cry about in your masterminds, threaten to fire
team members over, and feel like a total failure as your financial runway
gets shorter than a Seth Godin blog post?
4. Indestructible Team by SoulPowered (Version 2):
What’s the Biggest Difference Between Predictable, Stress-Free Growth Pow-
ered By a Committed Team of Highly-Engaged A-Players…
… and a stagnating bottom line crumbling under the bloated overhead of
underperforming team members ready to jump ship at the first sign of
struggle?
Write Your Question Loop Headline:
Examples: www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 22 --

-5-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
The lead is an expansion of the Question Loop.
Its function is to unpack the importance of the question while ramping up
the stakes in having it answered.
What You’re Coaching:
Resonance/Agreement/Anticipation (through *head nod* moments)
Trust (that you *get* it)
Stakes (emotional need)
A knowledge gap (intellectual need)
How to Write It:
For the “if/without/would” question loop (version 1):
[Headline - Why committing to that outcome is critical]
[high level stakes in not committing to the outcome]
[Get agreement on bleeding neck pain point 1]
[Get agreement on bleeding neck pain point 2]
[Alchemize that agreement to a need to keep reading]
[The Promise or short MOHP they’ll get in return for reading]
For the “difference maker” question loop (version 2):
[if you guessed *something they’re doing* 1, you’d be wrong]
[if you guessed *something they’re doing* 2, you’d be wrong]
[if you guessed *something they’re doing* 3/4/5, you’d be wrong]
[Declare the incompleteness of the above]
[Lead into the MOHT]
Section 3 - The Leadwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 22 --

-6-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
1. List Builder’s Lab 2.0 by Amy Porterfield (version 1)
Here’s Why Anything Short of an Enthusiastic *Head Nod* Is Costing You Big
TIme
Every day, with credit card in hand, THOUSANDS of your most valuable po-
tential customers opt-in to someone’s email list with the hopes of having
their most urgent problems solved.
Question is:
Are they opting in to yours?
And whether you’ve created an online course or have plans to create one in
the near future, the success of your service, coaching, or training business
rests heavily on your answer to this question.
If you know WITHOUT A DOUBT
That you’re not reaching as many QUALIFIED, ready-to-buy subscribers as
you should
Or
Your current list building strategies feel random at best (and soooooo 2016),
draining your energy while failing to attract a steady stream of leads that
would make any of that hustle feel worth it…
Then Keep Reading…
Cause what follows could EASILY be the most pivotal moment you look back
on a few weeks from now when your email list is flushed with a fresh stack
of soon-to-be buyers who dig your stuff, and aren’t afraid to punch in their
credit card details to prove it.
But First…
Examples: www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 22 --

-7-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
2. 10x Launches by Ry Schwartz (version 2)
If you guessed “funnel strategy”, you’d be wrong.
If you guessed “how much cash you dropped on your business coach” you’d
still be wrong
And if you guessed …
… how many JV Partners you’ve locked down.
… how many FB ninjas you have dropping pixels on your prospects
… or how many masterminds, lucky mantras, or mailchimp contacts you
have in your system…
You’d still be oh-so-terribly wrong.
Cause here’s the deal.
3. Indestructible Team by SoulPowered: (version 2)
If you guessed “compensation package”... you’d be wrong.
If you guessed how many Myers Briggs, Strengthsfinders, or other compe-
tency tests-de-jour you’ve put them through… you’d be wrong.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 22 --

-8-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
And if you guessed how many Zoom check-ins, Slack chat rooms, or team
retreats you’ve booked on your iCal… you’d still be wrong.
Cause while all these things have their place…
They’re only part of the equation.
And unless you’ve ENGINEERED your team for massive contribution, rapid
scale, and “whooaa… they can make money without me” autonomy…
The impact and income you’re working tirelessly to scale will at best come at
the expense of your cortisol levels…
… and at worst, erupt into flames as you constantly flirt with an unrelenting
sense of burnout.
Write Your Lead:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 22 --

-9-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
What You’re Coaching:
Intimacy with the symptoms of the problem
How it shows up / how it affects them / what will happen if they
allow it to continue
Trust (by accurately reflecting back the MOHT)
Discord/Disharmony/Discomfort with the current situation.
Friction to overcome inertia.
How to Write it:
Flexible structure. Sourced from:
Launch Bible Workbook (Section 3)
67 Golden Questions (Section 10)
Coach-Mining / Enrollment Extractor Workbook (Section 1)
Section 4 - Moment of Highest Tension
1. 10x Launches by Ry Schwartz
We’ve Reached an Execution Crisis.
You have more funnel and launch methods at your disposal than ever
before.
… Survey funnels
… 3-part video funnels
… Evergreen webinar funnels
Examples:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 22 --

-10-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Heck, a quick inventory of the most popular programs that teach those
methods shows no less than 10,000 students.
10,000 jacked up, “it’s my time”, course creators and online entrepreneurs
just like you.
Yet how many super successful 6 and 7-figure product launches do you see
coming out of them?
5? 10? 20?
Holy outliers batman.
And it’s NOT because those funnels or launch strategies are wrong or inef-
fective.
It’s just that they’re….
Incomplete.
You see…
While you jet set to San Diego, Austin or NYC for your latest Mastermind to
play a silly game of “my funnel’s bigger than your funnel” with other entre-
preneurs and course creators who always seem “on the verge of financial
breakthrough” but never beyond it…
That funnel you like to brag about is missing its most important ingredient.
The copy.
Y’know, the words that are meant to magically fill those harrowing little
email boxes on your funnel map.
Meaning that “magic funnel” or course launch that was supposed to be your
entry ticket to
… scaled up profits that let you quit your day job
… hiring an actual team to do the things you hate
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 22 --

-11-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
… enrolling more clients, creating more impact, and engineering more “holy
sh*t I actually did it” marketing moments.
Simply. Never. Happen.
And I get it…
Writing emails sucks.
Or at least the way you’re used to doing it.
That’s why you put it off till the last second until you realize that those damn
suckers won’t write themselves.
So you go into scramble mode.
Revving up your internal engines with a deadly concoction of binaural beats,
bulletproof coffee and brain drugs with bad names, all in a fruitless attempt
to fill your funnel with the words that will actually get your course or pro-
gram into the hands of your best customers.
Only to soon find that the BP coffee’s run dry and you’re still standing
face-to-face with a blank google doc and the prospect of another botched
launch.
In a final herculean attempt, you blast “sympathy for the devil” through your
Bose headphones and Skype-dial everyone you know to see if they know an
amazing (and cheap) launch copywriter with immediate availability.
aka a unicorn.
aka something more rare and precious than the lovechild between Nessie
and a Yeti.
And maybe you cash in on your good karma and manage to get an ace copy-
writer on the line.
Looks promising until you learn you’ll need to take out a reverse mortgage
just to have them write the first paragraph of the first email.
So you push back your launch dates.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 22 --

-12-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Inform your JV partners that you’ve run into some “unexpected blips”.
And crawl back into your entrepreneurial cave with your tail between your
legs until the next “magical funnel” comes along and you start the process
all over again.
Want to opt-out of the execution crisis?
2. List Builder’s Lab 2.0 by Amy Porterfield
The Million Dollar Question
(And Why I Still Cringe When I Hear It)
You’ve probably been asked this dozens of times.
Maybe even HUNDREDS.
By business coaches, potential partners, mastermind groups and concerned
spouses.
They ask it with the best of intentions.
But even still, it can land like an A-bomb to an entrepreneur’s fragile psyche.
Especially when you’re already skating on thin ice, doing EVERYTHING you
can to gain traction, yet unsure how many more hits you can take before the
ice cracks and you fall back into whatever world you just left behind.
So What’s The Question?
How Many People Do You Have On Your List?
UGH.
Still makes me want to slip on my invisible cloak and dig myself a deep digi-
tal hole.
And maybe you can relate.
Because in my mind, there’s no question more anxiety provoking for an
online business owner in their first few years than this one.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 22 --

-13-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
It’s a question that can make you feel like a total fraud.
(or in my case, a flat out failure).
And I still remember the first time I got asked it.
It was almost a year after I left my job as the head of content for Tony Rob-
bins to go off and do this whole “online business thing”.
And despite coming from such a great “traditional” background… one which
people always seemed impressed by, I was a total amateur at online mar-
keting.
And my list of just 600 subscribers (mostly concerned friends and family)
confirmed it.
Even the few people I DID have on my list were unengaged freebie seekers.
Swiping my free report then disappearing before I even had a chance to say
“hello”.
But the most painful part wasn’t the fact that I was spending long nights
working my butt off with no results to show for it…
It was that my number of subscribers (or lack thereof) served as a constant,
clear-cut reminder of my failed efforts.
It was like a calling card for my failure.
But even still....
I’m grateful people asked it.
Grateful that people are asking it to YOU.
Because that single question… and the ACTIONS you take to finally be able
to answer it with unshakable confidence, holds the key to your flourishing
online business.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 22 --

-14-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
3. Indestructible Team by SoulPowered:
Here’s Why “Scaling Up” Gets a Bad Wrap
Scaling your company’s impact and income should be an exciting time for
you.
After years of honing your skill, expressing it in a valuable way, and hustling
your way to levels of growth most would kill for…
You’ve EARNED your way to more leverage.
More financial reward.
And the freedom to take off all the hats that don’t quite fit…
And instead explore and execute on the new opportunities, breakthrough
projects, and exhilarating visions that drive you…
All while operating as the confident, in-control leader or CEO supported by a
team that’s EQUALLY excited and committed to bringing your vision to life.
But it didn’t quite work out that way did it?
Instead…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 22 --

-15-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
You wear more hats than ever.
Cover up more mistakes than ever.
Cancel more date nights, SoulCycle sessions, and family outings than ever…
And suffer through more isolation, burnout, and frustration than any
normal human should ever endure as you vent about things like…
… why does it feel like I’m the only one around here who cares about what
we do?
… why am I putting out fires for people who didn’t do the ONE thing I hired
them for?
… why, after all I’ve achieved, does it feel like we’re ONE disaster away from
the whole thing blowing up?
If you’re ready to take off the blinders, here’s why:
Deep breath.
We got you :)
But if you’re currently wearing more hats than you should, constantly deal-
ing with disengaged underperforming team members, and feeling like your
business is under a constant, invisible threat that’s ready to wipe the whole
thing away without notice…
Then I gotta be honest with you.
You’re not “scaling”.
You’re failing.
90% of businesses don’t fail. 90% of teams do.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 22 --

-16-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Scaling 	Failing
Your team is empowered,
resourceful, and self-motivated…
making massive contributions
without your direct involvement.
Your team needs you for every-
thing. Your inbox or slack channel
is filled with questions and mes-
sages that scream “dependence”,
pulling you back “in the business”
and grinding momentum to a
halt.
Your team is fully bought in and
committed to your vision.
You’re an island and feeling super
isolated. As if no one else “gets it”.
When things go wrong, your team
is able to fix it and put out the
fires without you.
You’re the chief fire attendant.
You spend half your day in a state
of panic, and can’t remember the
last time you slept 8 hours, fin-
ished a workout, or ate a decent
meal without having your iPhone
blink up.
You’re free to LEAD and perform
the functions that excite you - and
explore new opportunities that
serve the growth of the company.
You’re a generalist, covering the
tracks of underperforming team
members who are more inclined
to jump ship than take owner-
ship..
You’re working “on your business” 	You’re self-eroding “in your
business”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 22 --

-17-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
4. Funnels That Scale by Greg Hickman
We’ve Reached a Funnel Implementation Crisis
(... and damn right, it’s not your fault)
Let me know if this sounds familiar:
You started this whole funnel building thing with a fully loaded Starbucks
card and a full tank of “we’re gonna make it rain” motivation.
You bought into the “Proven Systems”, “12-Step Blueprints”, and “Magic
Funnel on Steroids Formulas”.
Invested in the premium plans of all the go-to softwares (Leadpages, Click-
funnels, SamCart, etc.) seeing the extra investment as a “drop in the bucket”
compared to what your funnel will be poised to bring in.
Pillaged your network to line up a “dream team” of freelancers - designers,
copywriters, programmers, automation people, fb ads people, VA’s, etc.
And then you cued up the “Productive Morning” playlist on spotify and got
to work.
You were ready to make your dent.
Primed to be the success story other people talked about -- instead of the
one that convinced you to buy that last program.
Hell no -- you weren’t motivated by pina coladas on a beach or a 600 hp
lambo you’d be too nervous to drive around the block.
Honestly…
You’d be totally cool with the luxury to enjoy an extended morning routine
complete with buttered coffee, Beethoven, and that bestseller that Amazon
drone-shipped to your door last week that you haven’t even cracked open --
all while your sales roll in and customers get served on autopilot.
But things haven’t quite worked out that way.
Your #miraclemornings have turned into #middaymeltdowns
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 22 --

-18-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Your killer software stack sits unused with every subsequent re-bill a nasty
reminder of how little momentum you’ve generated.
And as “launch my funnel” headlines your quarterly goals list for the 8th
straight time, even YOU, the eternal-freakin-optimist, are starting to doubt it
will ever actually happen.
That you’ll get to grab a juicy piece of this whole “freedom” thing the inter-
net’s been going ape sh*t over for the last 10 years.
And that you could actually be the calm, powerful and profitable CEO of a
fully leveraged and quickly scaling online business -- instead of constantly
being air-dropped into a marketing battlefield filled with contradictory
advice, shiny objects set to stun, and more gurus than an Indian ashram.
Write Your MOHT:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-19-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
What You’re Coaching:
Possibility and Desire
Buy-in/commitment to a new future
Trust (by accurately reflecting back/validating their dreams)
Continued discord/Intolerance with the current situation.
(amplifying friction through the contrast between their actual reality
and what should be their reality ).
How to Write it:
Flexible structure. Sourced from:
Launch Bible Workbook (Section 3)
67 Golden Questions Section 4 (Q’s 2-4) & Section 10
Coach-Mining / Enrollment Extractor Workbook (Section 2)
Section 5 - The Moment of Highest Pleasure
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 20 of 22 --

-20-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
1. Funnels That Scale by Greg Hickman:
With All That Intense Effort And Commitment, Isn’t it Time You Actually
Started Receiving Some Damn Payoff?
With the amount of time, effort, and bullish commitment you’ve invested in
growing your online business through automated marketing funnels, you
DESERVE the payoff.
You deserve to know EXACTLY how to fully leverage your time and energy --
waking up every morning to a steady stream of SamCart or Paypal notifica-
tions, and a crystal clear idea of what’s needed to amplify your results.
You deserve to actually have the bulk of the work DONE FOR YOU, instead of
being told what to do, and then being funnel shamed by coaches who make
a living telling people what to do yet never doing it themselves.
You deserve to actually feel like the powerful leader and CEO of a quickly
growing online business, instead of a perpetual seeker - jumping from one
course to the next hoping “this will be the one”.
In a moment, I’m going to show you how to FINALLY tip the scales back in
your favor.
But first, a few key things you gotta soak your brain’s grey matter into…
2. Indestructible Team by SoulPowered
The secret to working “on your business” instead of “in it”
Let’s be real:
You don’t need (or even want) a Tim Ferriss-approved 4 hour workweek.
You just want to be able to work ON YOUR BUSINESS, grow your income,
and fulfill your company’s mission without sacrificing the best years of your
life to do it.
You want to be as involved in the day-to-day as you CHOOSE to be.
Examples: www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 22 --

-21-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
And at this point in your career, you feel like you’ve earned the right to put
your phone on airplane mode, sit down for a decent meal, and spoil yourself
with a long shower without mentally triaging through a never-ending to-do
list.
“Self Care” shouldn’t be this mythical thing with no basis in your reality.
“I have no time” shouldn’t be the most frequently thing uttered from your
lips.
And late night venting to your partner should be replaced with clink-worthy
wins, celebrating the predictable, trackable, and exponential growth that
your business generates EVERY SINGLE DAY without you doing all the nitty
gritty.
Write Your MOHP:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 22 --
